name: option-list
title: Option List
description: Open panel and option rows: search, checkboxes, secondary text, scroll, and footer actions.

api.description: Open panel and option rows for pickers. Select composes this list for its menu.

props.name: selectionMode
props.description: Single value or multiple values.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled value in single mode.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial value in single mode.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called when the single value changes.

props.name: values
props.description: Controlled values in multiple mode.

props.name: defaultValues
props.description: Uncontrolled initial values in multiple mode.

props.name: onValuesChange
props.description: Called when multiple values change.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled open state.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description: Uncontrolled initial open state.

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Called when the panel opens or closes.

props.name: closeOnSelect
props.description: Close after choosing a row. Defaults to true in single mode, false in multiple.

props.name: submenuAnimated
props.description: Default motion for all nested OptionListSubmenu panels. true plays open/close animations; false makes nested menus appear and disappear instantly. Overridden by OptionListSubmenu or OptionListSubContent animated.

props.name: submenuOpenDuration
props.description: Default open animation duration in milliseconds for nested submenus. Ignored when submenuAnimated is false. Overridden by OptionListSubmenu or OptionListSubContent openDuration.

props.name: submenuCloseDuration
props.description: Default close animation duration in milliseconds for nested submenus. Ignored when submenuAnimated is false. Overridden by OptionListSubmenu or OptionListSubContent closeDuration.

groups.title: OptionListTrigger
groups.description: Opens and closes the option list. Use render to compose onto Badge or another host.

props.name: render
props.description: Host element to clone trigger behavior onto (for example Badge). Owns click, keyboard, and anchor ref.

props.name: children
props.description: Trigger content (label, chevron, etc.).

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles.

props.name: …button attributes
props.description: Native button props when not using render.

groups.title: OptionListContent
groups.description: Portaled or inline panel with optional search, scroll, footer, and dismissOnScroll.

props.name: align
props.description: Horizontal anchor relative to the trigger. auto picks the best fit.

props.name: alignItemWithTrigger
props.description: When true, menu width matches the trigger. When false, the menu hugs option content (and stays at least as wide as the trigger).

props.name: side
props.description: Preferred placement side.

props.name: sideOffset
props.description: Gap between trigger and panel.

props.name: alignOffset
props.description: Shift along the alignment axis.

props.name: portal
props.description: Render in a portal. Set false for inline previews.

props.name: dismissOnScroll
props.description: Close when the page scrolls. Scrolling inside the list stays open. Set false to keep the panel following the trigger (it can cover sticky chrome).

props.name: search
props.description: Show a search field above the options.

props.name: searchPlaceholder
props.description: Placeholder for the search field.

props.name: searchValue
props.description: Controlled search query.

props.name: defaultSearchValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial search query.

props.name: onSearchChange
props.description: Called when the search query changes.

props.name: scrollable
props.description: Wrap options in the kit ScrollArea (custom scrollbar). Defaults on for plain panels and off when the panel contains a submenu; pass explicitly to override.

props.name: scrollMaxHeight
props.description: Max height of the scrollable body before it scrolls (stacked panels default to 16rem). When the panel opens, the selected option scrolls into view while list order stays the same.

props.name: scrollThumbGap
props.description: Space on each side of the scrollbar thumb, in pixels. Defaults to one spacing unit via --df-option-list-scroll-thumb-gap.

props.name: footer
props.description: Footer actions under the options (for example Reset).

props.name: className
props.description: Panel surface styles.

groups.title: OptionListItem
groups.description: Selectable row with leading control, secondary copy, trailing badge or chevron, and selection indicator. Inside OptionListSubmenu (trigger zone) it opens the submenu on hover instead of selecting.

props.name: value
props.description: Option value stored in selection state.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Non-selectable row.

props.name: leading
props.description: Leading control. Use "checkbox" for multi-select rows.

props.name: secondary
props.description: Supporting copy beside or under the label.

props.name: layout
props.description: inline places secondary beside the label; stacked places it underneath.

props.name: trailing
props.description: End-of-row slot: badge counter, nested-menu chevron, or both. When set, the selected check is hidden unless indicator is forced on.

props.name: indicator
props.description: Selected check in single mode. Defaults off when leading is checkbox or trailing is set; otherwise on.

props.name: children
props.description: Primary label text for the row.

props.name: className
props.description: Additional row styles.

props.name: …div attributes
props.description: Native div props. Use data-highlighted for hover/open parent rows in nested menus.

groups.title: OptionListSubmenu
groups.description: Hover-open nested branch. Wrap a trigger OptionListItem and an OptionListSubContent. Nest again inside the content for deeper levels. Motion defaults inherit from OptionList and can be overridden here.

props.name: open
props.description: Controlled submenu open state.

props.name: defaultOpen
props.description: Uncontrolled initial open state (useful for docs previews).

props.name: onOpenChange
props.description: Called when the submenu opens or closes.

props.name: animated
props.description: true plays fade/slide open and close for this branch. false opens and closes instantly with no motion. Prefer OptionList submenuAnimated=false to turn off motion for every nested level at once.

props.name: openDuration
props.description: Open animation duration in milliseconds for this branch. Only applies when animated is true.

props.name: closeDuration
props.description: Close animation duration in milliseconds for this branch. Only applies when animated is true. Keep this shorter than openDuration for a snappy dismiss.

props.name: closeDelay
props.description: Milliseconds to wait after the pointer leaves the branch before starting close. Gives time to move into the child panel. Exit animation (if animated) starts after this delay.

props.name: children
props.description: Trigger OptionListItem plus OptionListSubContent (and nested submenus).

groups.title: OptionListSubContent
groups.description: Child panel for a submenu. Opens on hover of the parent row; nest further OptionListSubmenu trees inside. Placement and motion can be set per panel.

props.name: side
props.description: Preferred placement relative to the parent row.

props.name: sideOffset
props.description: Gap between the parent row and the child panel.

props.name: align
props.description: Alignment along the parent row.

props.name: alignOffset
props.description: Shift along the alignment axis.

props.name: portal
props.description: Render in a portal. Set false for inline nested previews in docs.

props.name: animated
props.description: Per-panel motion override. false makes this panel appear and disappear instantly even if parent submenus are animated.

props.name: openDuration
props.description: Per-panel open duration in milliseconds. Ignored when animated is false.

props.name: closeDuration
props.description: Per-panel close duration in milliseconds. Ignored when animated is false.

props.name: className
props.description: Panel surface styles.

props.name: children
props.description: Option rows and nested OptionListSubmenu branches.

groups.title: OptionListSearch
groups.description: Search field used when content search is composed manually.

props.name: placeholder
props.description: Empty-state hint.

props.name: value
props.description: Controlled query.

props.name: defaultValue
props.description: Uncontrolled initial query.

props.name: onValueChange
props.description: Called when the query changes.

props.name: size
props.description: SearchInput size.

props.name: clearable
props.description: Show clear control when filled.

groups.title: OptionListBody
groups.description: Scrollable or static body wrapping option rows.

props.name: scrollable
props.description: Wrap children in ScrollArea.

props.name: maxHeight
props.description: Height constraint when scrollable.

props.name: scrollThumbGap
props.description: Space on each side of the scrollbar thumb, in pixels.

props.name: children
props.description: Option rows.

props.name: children
props.description: Footer actions (for example Reset / Select all).

props.name: className
props.description: Additional styles.

props.name: OptionListGroup
props.description: Groups related items.

props.name: OptionListLabel
props.description: Muted group heading inside the panel.

props.name: OptionListSeparator
props.description: Horizontal rule between sections.

props.name: OptionListScrollUpButton / ScrollDownButton
props.description: Optional scroll affordances for long lists.

props.name: useOptionListContext
props.description: Read open state, selection, labels, and search from parts.

props.name: Hug content
props.description: Panel width follows option content; at least trigger width.

props.name: Match trigger width
props.description: Lock panel width to the trigger.

props.name: Inline previews
props.description: Render the panel in place for docs and nested layouts.

props.name: Trailing badge counter
props.description: Number badge at the end of the row. Right padding matches checkbox rows; selected check stays hidden.

props.name: Nested submenu row
props.description: Hover the parent row to open the child panel on the right. Nest Submenu trees for three or more levels. Use trailing for badge + ChevronRight. Control motion with submenuAnimated / animated (boolean) and submenuOpenDuration / submenuCloseDuration or openDuration / closeDuration (ms).

props.name: Instant nested menus
props.description: Disable open/close animation for every nested level from OptionList. Equivalent per-branch: OptionListSubmenu animated={false}.

props.name: Custom nested speed
props.description: Set open and close durations in milliseconds on OptionList (defaults 180 / 90). Override on a single Submenu or SubContent when one branch should feel different.

props.name: Item spacing
props.description: Rows use kit gap and hover/selected/disabled states via data attributes.

groups.title: Tokens
groups.description: Theme defaults live on :root. Override these globally or on a local host.

props.name: --df-option-list-min-width
props.description: Minimum panel width.

props.name: --df-option-list-scroll-thumb-gap
props.description: Space on each side of the scrollbar thumb. Overridable via scrollThumbGap.

props.name: --df-option-list-scroll-track-width
props.description: Track width used to reserve the option-list scroll gutter.

props.name: --df-menu-min-width
props.description: Minimum menu width.

props.name: --df-menu-max-height
props.description: Maximum panel height before scrolling.

props.name: --df-menu-stacked-max-height
props.description: Maximum body height when a footer is present.

props.name: --df-submenu-min-width
props.description: Minimum nested submenu width.

props.name: --df-submenu-max-height
props.description: Maximum nested submenu height.
